meta.title: Disclaimer
meta.description: The information provided on Civic Awareness is intended for general educational and informational purposes only.

cards.title: Educational Purpose
cards.text: Our articles are created to raise civic awareness and educate readers. They should not be considered legal, professional, or official advice.

cards.title: Accuracy of Information
cards.text: We make every effort to keep our content accurate and up to date. However, we cannot guarantee that all information will always remain complete or current.

cards.title: External Links
cards.text: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or policies of those external websites.

cards.title: Limitation of Liability
cards.text: Civic Awareness is not liable for any loss or damages arising from the use of information available on this website. Users should exercise their own judgment when applying any information.
